articles.title: Sinopharm Explores Noninvasive Glucose Monitoring To Deepen China Diabetes Role
articles.summary: Sinopharm Group (SEHK:1099) has entered into a mutual NDA with Woori IO to explore noninvasive glucose monitoring technology in China. The agreement centers on potential commercialization of Woori IO's technology for diabetes care in the Chinese market. The collaboration may lead to further clinical development and potential global trials if progress continues. For investors tracking healthcare in China, this move positions Sinopharm Group, a major pharma and healthcare distributor, closer...
